spec.rawSql:
SELECT timestamp AS "time",
         CASE WHEN gas_detected THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "Тревога"
  FROM mq2_reading
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  ORDER BY timestamp

spec.title: Время с последних данных от DHT22

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - last_seen_at)) AS "Секунд с последних данных от DHT22"
FROM
  sensor
where 
  type = 'DHT22'

spec.title: Время с последних данных от MQ-2

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - last_seen_at)) AS "Секунд с последних данных от MQ-2"
FROM
  sensor
where 
  type = 'MQ2'

spec.title: Время с последних данных от HC-SR04

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - last_seen_at)) AS "Секунд с последних данных от HC-SR04"
FROM
  sensor
where 
  type = 'HCSR04'

spec.title: Время с последних данных от BMP280

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - last_seen_at)) AS "Секунд с последних данных от BMP280"
FROM
  sensor
where 
  type = 'BMP280'

SELECT timestamp AS "time",                                                                                                          
         humidity AS "Влажность %"
  FROM dht22_reading
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)                                                                                                       
  ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT timestamp AS "time",
         pressure_hpa AS "Давление hPa"
  FROM bmp280_reading
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)                                                                                                       
  ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT timestamp AS "time",                                                                                                          
         temperature AS "Температура DHT22"                                                                                                        
FROM dht22_reading           
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY timestamp;

SELECT timestamp AS "time",                                                                                                          
       temperature AS "Температура BMP280"
FROM bmp280_reading                                                                                                                  
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT timestamp AS "time",
         raw_value AS "Кол-во газа"
  FROM mq2_reading                                                                                                                     
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT timestamp AS "time",
         distance_cm AS "Расстояние см"
  FROM hcsr04_reading                  
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  ORDER BY timestamp
